notes: v1.14.76 - Offline AI pre-check (roadmap P0 hardening): every AI surface funnels through phantomAI, which now fails fast with a clear 'Offline — AI unavailable' toast + a Response-shaped offline result when navigator.onLine is false, instead of ~23s of fetch timeout + retries ([8000,15000]ms x2). Honors the offline-first contract; existing resp.ok/resp.json callers short-circuit gracefully. No change when online.
